ces Presentations FAQ Download Home Ptolemy II 3.0.2 Applets Browse Release Web Start Windows Installer Source Download Cygwin Limitations FAQ Using Vergil Design Doc Skip to sidebar Ptolemy II 3.0.2 Notes for Mac OS X Mac OS X Java 1.4 Instructions

Notes for Mac OS X Mac OS X Java 1.4 Instructions Ptolemy II 3.0.2 requires Java 1.4 because it uses the java.net.URI class which is not present in Java 1.3. Mac OS X 10.2 is required to run Java 1.4. http://developer.apple.com/java/faq/index.html#ge

http://developer.apple.com/java/faq/index.html#gen_1 says: Q: What version of Java is included on Mac OS X? A: Apple is now shipping a J2SE 1.4.1 implementation for Mac OS X 10.2 Jaguar, available via the Software Update mechanism. It is based on

ia the Software Update mechanism. It is based on the J2SE 1.4.1_01 JDK with the HotSpot Client VM. Mac OS X Web Start Problems Under Mac OS 10.2 with Java 1.4, the Web Start binary downloads and starts up, but there might be a delay while the rest o

ts up, but there might be a delay while the rest of the modules are pulled over the network. Mac OS X UI bugs Drag and Drop does not work Dragging an actor from the actor library pane on the left results in java.lang.ClassCastException at sun

lts in java.lang.ClassCastException at sun.awt.datatransfer.DataTransferer.translateTransferable(DataTransferer.java:1197) at apple.awt.CDataTransferer.translateTransferable(CDataTransferer.java:128) at sun.awt.datatransfer.Da

ferer.java:128) at sun.awt.datatransfer.DataTransferer$6.run(DataTransferer.java:1937) at java.awt.event.InvocationEvent.dispatch(InvocationEvent.java:178) at java.awt.EventQueue.dispatchEvent(EventQueue.java:448) at j

ava.awt.EventDispatchThread.run(EventDispatchThread.java:99) The following Sun Java Topic might be of use http://forum.java.sun.com/thread.jsp?thread=184916&forum=5&message=654598 Making ptolemy/vergil/toolbox/PtolemyTransferable.java implement Seria

l/toolbox/PtolemyTransferable.java implement Serializable might help. Editing how the DataFlavor is created in PtolemyTransferable might also help: public static final DataFlavor namedObjFlavor = new DataFlavor(DataFlavor.javaJVMLocalObjectMimeT

new DataFlavor(DataFlavor.javaJVMLocalObjectMimeType + ";class=ptolemy.kernel.util.NamedObj", "Named Object"); The above change was added between Ptolemy II 3.0-beta and Ptolemy II 3.0.2. There are problems with the right mouse button Us

There are problems with the right mouse button Usually click and hold or Control-click simulates the right button, but not under HyVisual In Ptolemy II 3.0.2, we modified ptolemy/vergil/actor/ActorEditorGraphController.java to use Command-Click to c
itorGraphController.java to use Command-Click to create new relations and drag new edges Contact Update Help Copyright © 1999 - UC Regents; all rights reserved.
